utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No , these are not all my suitcases . This one Paolo .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Um , um , Rachel can we talk for a sec ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , sure ... just a sec , though , cause Paolo on his way over .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ok , um , we have not known each other for that long a time , and , um , there are three things that you should know about me .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: One , my friends are the most important thing in my life , two , I never lie , and three , I make the best oatmeal raisin cookies in the world .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ok , thanks Pheebs Oh my God , why have I never tasted these before ? !

emotion_cause.span: 13_these are the best oatmeal cookies I have ever had .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , I do not make them a lot because I do not think it is fair to the other cookies

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: All right , well , you are right , these are the best oatmeal cookies I have ever had .

emotion_cause.span: 13_these are the best oatmeal cookies I have ever had

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Which proves that I never lie .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Paolo made a pass at me .
